summary: Fixed AskUserQuestion execute() race handling so instant local null results no longer cancel remote phone dialogs; genuinely unavailable local+remote now returns nonInteractiveResult.
filesChanged: extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts - changed ctx.hasUI race handling for local null and remote unavailable branches
raw:
## Completed
Fixed the `ctx.hasUI` race path so an instant `null` local `ctx.ui.custom(...)` result is treated as non-authoritative, not as a user cancellation. Remote phone dialogs now stay alive and decide the result.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - updated `execute()` race handling for local-null and remote-unavailable cases.

## How To Verify
```bash
bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh && node --check extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts
```

Also ran the provided Foreman verify gate successfully.

## Notes
Before: instant local `null` cancelled the remote and returned “User cancelled AskUserQuestion.”  
After: local real answer still wins; local `null` waits for remote; no local/remote UI returns `nonInteractiveResult`.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)

  "howToVerify": "bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh && node --check extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts"
}
